sections.paragraph:
ἀκατάλυτος, ον (καταλύω ‘dissolve, break up’ etc.) pert. to being indestructible, endless (Dionys. Hal. 10, 31, 5; Chion, Ep. 14, 1; 4 Macc 10:11) ζωή Hb 7:16.—DELG s.v. λύω. TW.

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

Chion Chion , IV b.c.; for letters attributed to him, I a.d., s. Ep.—List 5

Ep.

Ep. = Epistola/Epistula, when applied to letters mostly pseudonymous; various dates—List 5

  1. = epistle

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 35
